title: Survival Mod
description: Survival Mod add ores, special items like dynamites, magic wands and a few mobs
body: Survival Mod is a mod created in 2020 for an old Minecraft server called Survival Craft (now it's a modpack) the server stopped and we decided to upload the mod on modrinth and curseforge, and here we are !  The mod add ores (Copper, Sapphire, Ruby, Tin, Manganese and more in the next updates), bunch of new items like Dynamites, Backpacks, Item Destroyer, Miner Item Destroyer, with a few new dimensions (Ruby Dimension, Upside Down, Desert and more in the coming updates) to explore and exploit to have more powerful ressources and a boss ( in the creeper’s dimension) to destroy with a few mobs ! And a new machine which is the Dust Atomizer. New Adventurer it's now your turn to visit a new world. But be aware you are not alone, he’s looking 👀.             Discord of FoudreTeam (updated) : https://discord.gg/szVaUwdQjF FoudreTeam Website : https://foudreteam.wixsite.com/foudreteam Need help about the mod ? Here is the official Survival Mod Wiki : https://foudreteam.wixsite.com/foudreteam/survival-mod-wiki           The mod support 2 languages: French, English      Survival Craft ModPack is now available for everyone  https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/survival-craft-foudreteam    if you have any suggestion you can send it here : https://foudreteam.wixsite.com/foudreteam/forum/general-discussion/ideas-for-survival-mod-or-survival-craft   every donation cannot be refund
